response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with strong fundamentals in TypeScript, Node.js, and software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD). Recent role at re:cinq touches on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, which aligns with the job's MCP and agentic workflow focus. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production AI/GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), or major cloud platform AI services. Customer-facing technical leadership at staff level is also not clearly demonstrated. Worth a screening call to probe depth of recent GenAI work.
strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background with TypeScript/Node.js and 15+ years shipping production systems
Recent exposure to MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, talks, and founding GISCollective
concerns: No clear 8+ years of production GenAI/AI solution development as required
Missing explicit experience with RAG, vector databases, and multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI)
Limited evidence of customer-facing discovery sessions or enterprise forward-deployed consulting work
